data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with the Microsoft Testing Platform enabled. Tests are categorized — I'll filter for `Integration` only.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with category filter

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests with category filter

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` is enabled in `Directory.Build.props`). The tests have categories "Unit" and "Integration". The user wants to run only the integration tests.

With MSTest v3 and the testing platform, filtering by category uses `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

arguments.description: Run integration tests with category filter

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-6d210a1d3c4e45fb80948e512288cdf2 && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests with category filter", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests with category filter
